departments.CSM: Computer Science with Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
departments.CIC: Computer Science & Engineering (IOT and Cyber Security including Blockchain Technology)
departments.CAD: Computer Science with Artificial Intelligence and Data Science

fees.note: Fees are per year. Scholarships available for eligible students.

facilities.hostel: Hostel available for boys and girls. Fee approximately 75,000 per year including food.
facilities.sports: Cricket, Football, Volleyball, Kabaddi, Athletics, Carrom, Chess
facilities.buses: College buses start at 7:00 AM from major city points.
facilities.wifi: High speed WiFi across entire campus.
facilities.medical: On-campus medical room with first aid.
facilities.labs: Modern computer, science and engineering labs.
facilities.auditorium: Large auditorium for events and cultural programs.

placements.info: Top companies visit campus every year.

extra_curriculum.NCC: National Cadet Corps - discipline and leadership training.
extra_curriculum.NSS: National Service Scheme - social service activities.
extra_curriculum.annual_fest: Annual college fest with cultural events and competitions.
extra_curriculum.tech_fest: Annual technical fest with hackathons and project expo.

scholarships.merit: Merit scholarships for top EAMCET rankers.

admission.process: Through AP EAMCET or AP ECET counseling
